title: Scout Soldier
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Scout Soldiers''' were members of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services|Scout Service]]. These troopers received military training, and were not aimed at exploring; instead, their goal was to protect worlds from hostile forces and quell riots as needed.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-03-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts]]''
